topic: Same agent-set as Veriton + verify YOUR aliases
body: agent-setup/ADD-NEW-AGENT-RUNBOOK.md = how to set up each agent exactly like the Veriton fleet (thin client -> box orchestrator + autonomous loop + 4-model + continuity + git repo + alias, --dangerously-skip-permissions built in, _claude_remote exports CLAUDE_AGENT_NAME). agent-setup/VERIFY-YOUR-AGENTS.md = run it across ALL your aliases to prove each has its own identity + state, no state/unknown collision; paste the output to your chat. This is canonical (also on agent-continuity-kit).
